news.headline: Betsson Sport partners with Inter, logo on jerseys; features 2 stars for 20th Scudetto win.
news.summary: In July 1, 2024, in TA' XBIEX, Malta, popular betting company Betsson announced a new partnership with Inter, unveiling the Betsson Sport infotainment logo to be featured on Inter's jerseys. The collaboration comes in celebration of Betsson's 60th anniversary and Inter's recent 20th Scudetto victory, which will be symbolized by the addition of two stars on the team's jerseys - a first in their history. This strategic alliance signals a significant shift in the branding strategy for both parties involved and is poised to garner attention globally.

news.headline: Macron's risky move could result in a France that is difficult to govern.
Sydbank repurchases shares, transactions in week 26.
The theory behind the widespread frenzy explained in a recent report by Bloomberg.
Binance improves Auto-Invest entry points on website and app for better user experience. Read more for updates.
news.summary: Binance has recently improved its Auto-Invest feature by simplifying access points on its website and app, aiming to enhance user experience with the platform. This update has made it easier for users to utilize the Auto-Invest feature, potentially making it more convenient for a higher number of users to take advantage of this service.

news.headline: BearingPoint names 19 new Partners, aims for global growth. Record revenue at €1.017 billion in 2023.
news.summary: Amsterdam-based management and technology consultancy firm, BearingPoint, has recently promoted 19 new Partners internally, with the effective date set for July 1. Demonstrating a commitment to prioritizing people development, these appointments are in line with the company's growth strategy to expand its expertise and services on a global scale. In 2023, BearingPoint reported record-breaking revenue figures, totaling €1.017 billion, marking an impressive 18% surge compared to the previous year. Kiumars Hamidian, Managing Partner at BearingPoint, expressed enthusiasm about these developments as the firm continues to advance its position in the industry.

news.headline: Transfer of Registered Office from XXX to Malta finalised by Multitude SE, with 100 employees impacted.
Scandinavian Tobacco Group A/S finalizes acquisition of Mac Baren Tobacco Company A/S.
DFDS A/S initiates share buyback programme in compliance with EU regulations to enhance shareholder value.
news.summary: DFDS A/S disclosed on February 9, 2024, that they have launched a share repurchase scheme in compliance with the EU Market Abuse Regulation, EU Regulation no. 596/2014 of April 16, 2014, and the stipulations of Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052 of March 8, 2016, also known as the "Safe Harbour Rules."

news.headline: Li Auto Inc. delivered 47,774 vehicles in June 2024, up 46.7% YoY, totaling 108,581 in Q2 and 822,345 cumulatively.
news.summary: In Beijing, China, Li Auto Inc. revealed that in June 2024, they successfully delivered 47,774 vehicles, marking a substantial 46.7% increase compared to the previous year. This boosted their second-quarter deliveries to 108,581, showcasing a 25.5% year-over-year growth. Impressively, as of June 30, 2024, the Company has cumulatively delivered 822,345 vehicles, solidifying its position as the top new energy auto brand in China. Li Auto Inc., a key player in China's new energy vehicle market, trades on Nasdaq under the symbol LI and on HKEX as 2015.

news.headline: Bitcoin's price below $60K – potential bear trap? Monthly & quarterly close signals possible return to bull market.
news.summary: The price of Bitcoin has shown signs of a potential comeback in the bull market, as the monthly and quarterly closes have prevented a significant decline in BTC's value. This reversal comes as a relief to investors, with Bitcoin currently hovering around the **$40,000** mark. The positive trend is indicative of a renewed interest in the cryptocurrency, signaling a possible revitalization of the market in the near future.

news.headline: CertiK moves blockchain apps to Alibaba Cloud, boosting security and efficiency in Asia. #blockchain #AlibabaCloud
news.summary: CertiK recently made a strategic move to transfer operations to Alibaba Cloud with the objective of bolstering security measures and optimizing resource utilization for blockchain development in the Asia region. This decision signifies a significant step towards improving the overall safety and productivity of blockchain projects.

news.headline: Wuhu Xuanzhou Airport introduces int'l air cargo route to Hanoi, Vietnam; 1st flight by JD Airlines.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, JD Airlines successfully completed the inaugural flight of a new international air cargo route connecting Wuhu City in China's Anhui province with Hanoi, the capital of Vietnam. The plane landed at Wuhu Xuanzhou Airport, marking the beginning of this important route. This signifies a significant milestone for both cities in fostering stronger economic ties.

Cell Impact signed to develop prototype tool for European industrial supplier with global reach.
news.summary: Swedish company Cell Impact AB (publ) announced on July 1, 2024, that they have entered into a partnership with a prominent European industrial supplier with a wide global presence across various market sectors. The agreement revolves around a prototype forming tool that will be provided to the customer for assessment purposes. This collaboration signifies an important milestone for Cell Impact AB, solidifying its position in the market.

news.headline: Global youth participate in weeklong youth exchange program in China in June, with Juan Camilo Camargo Amaya from Colombia noting it as an "outstanding experience."
news.summary: In July 1, 2024, Juan Camilo Camargo Amaya, a participant from Colombia, shared his enthusiasm following a week-long youth exchange program in China during June, labeling it as "an exceptional experience." This marked his inaugural visit to the nation. "Exploring China has proven to be a...

news.headline: UK credit card trends in 2023-24 show rising consumer spend, lower payments, and high balances due to economic pressures.
news.summary: In the past year, UK households have faced difficulties in managing their finances due to increasing fuel costs, rising inflation, and wage constraints. According to data from global analytics software company FICO, the analysis of UK credit card data from March 2023 to March 2024 reveals the effects of these challenges on credit card usage and debt handling. Despite a rise in consumer expenditures, payments made towards balances decreased compared to the previous year. Credit card balances have stayed elevated, indicating ongoing financial strain on households.

news.headline: OKX to delist RNDR margin trading pairs and perpetual futures for better liquidity & user experience, effective July 2024.
news.summary: In July 2024, OKX will remove RNDR margin trading pairs and perpetual futures from its platform to enhance market liquidity and user experience.

news.headline: Schneider Electric Sustainability Impact Awards are open globally until Oct 15, 2024. Winners selected at country, regional, global levels.
news.summary: Schneider Electric has launched a program that is available to its customers, channel partners, and suppliers globally. The application process for the program has been made more straightforward, emphasizing how participants achieve results through strategizing, digitizing, and decarbonizing. Nominations are being accepted from now until October 15, 2024. The selection of winners will occur at the country, regional, and global levels towards the end of 2024 or early 2025.

North Rhine's CPI MoM came in at 0.1%, exceeding forecasts and up from the previous month's 0.0%.
ZEEKR reports 20,106 deliveries in June 2024 in Hangzhou, China.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited, a leading company in intelligent battery electric vehicle technology, shared its June 2024 delivery figures. The company, listed on the NYSE as ZK, successfully delivered 20,106 vehicles during this period.

news.headline: emc3 wins King's Award for Enterprise in International Trade, 1 of 252 organizations recognized. London, July 1, 2024.
news.summary: London, July 1, 2024 - emc3 has recently received accolades for its outstanding performance in International Trade and is among the 252 organizations in the country to be honored with the esteemed King's Award for Enterprise. This award, formerly named The Queen's Awards, highlights emc3's success and distinction in the field.

news.headline: Magene unveils electronic shifting groupset at EUROBIKE 2024, with wireless options for hydraulic disc brake and rim brake versions.
news.summary: Magene, a prominent player in cycling technology, unveils its newest electronic shifting groupset at EUROBIKE 2024 in Qingdao, China on July 1, 2024. This cutting-edge wireless shifting system is available in two variants - hydraulic disc brake and rim brake. The latest offering showcases Magene's commitment to innovation in the cycling industry.

news.headline: REYL Intesa Sanpaolo's governance transition approved, effective July 1, 2024. François Reyl joins Board, Pasha Bakhtiar becomes CEO.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, REYL Intesa Sanpaolo announced that FINMA has approved their new governance structure. François Reyl has been appointed as a Member of the Bank's Board of Directors and Chairman of its Strategic Committee. This move signifies a significant change in leadership within the organization.

news.headline: IFPA's 7th Conference on Psoriasis and Psoriatic Arthritis held in Stockholm from June 27-29, 2024, marked a significant success.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, the 7th IFPA Conference on World Psoriasis and Psoriatic Arthritis wrapped up in Stockholm, Sweden after taking place from June 27 to 29, 2024. Hosted by IFPA (The International Federation of Psoriasis Associations), this conference, which was established in 2006, brought together a significant number of experts and attendees to discuss the latest developments and challenges in the field of psoriasis and psoriatic arthritis.

Partners in Egypt sign deal with Yara Clean Ammonia for renewable ammonia offtake. Oslo & Cairo, July 1, 2024. #RenewableEnergy
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Scatec ASA, a prominent provider of renewable energy solutions, along with partners ECHEM and MOPCO, finalized Heads of Terms agreement with Yara Clean Ammonia for the offtake of renewable ammonia from Egypt. Yara Clean Ammonia, the biggest ammonia trader and distributor globally, will be the recipient of this agreement.

IASO Bio presented clinical data on Equecabtagene Autoleucel for CNS Autoimmunity at EAN Congress 2024 in Shanghai, Nanjing, China, and San Jose.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, IASO Biotechnology ("IASO Bio") shared clinical data in Shanghai, Nanjing, China, and San Jose, California. The biopharmaceutical company specializes in creating novel cell therapies and antibody products. They unveiled important findings related to their research and development efforts.

news.headline: Italy's manufacturing PMI was 45.7, beating the forecast of 44.3 and exceeding the previous 45.6.
Le Pen gains support in countless French communities, with a significant surge in backing.
news.summary: At least 20 people were injured in a recent explosion that occurred in a crowded market area. The incident took place in a bustling city center where hundreds of shoppers were present. Authorities reported that 5 of the injured individuals are in critical condition and have been rushed to the nearest hospital for treatment. Emergency responders, along with law enforcement officials, are currently at the scene investigating the cause of the explosion. Eyewitnesses recount a loud bang followed by panic and chaos as people tried to flee the area. The market has been cordoned off as a precautionary measure, and citizens are advised to stay away from the scene until further notice.

news.headline: RaySearch Laboratories AB releases RayStation 2024B with automated clinical workflows, enhancing treatment planning efficiency.
news.summary: RaySearch Laboratories AB (publ) has unveiled RayStation® 2024B in Stockholm on July 1, 2024. This updated version of their treatment planning system features enhanced automation for key clinical processes. Notably, the new release includes automated image processing and other vital workflows aimed at streamlining treatment planning. This launch marks a significant advancement for the company in delivering cutting-edge technology to healthcare providers.

news.headline: Binance expands Monitoring Tag to include 11 tokens like BAL, CTXC, CVX. Tag removed from 2 tokens on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: Starting on July 1, 2024, Binance plans to expand the Monitoring Tag to cover an additional 11 tokens, while concurrently removing it from two tokens. This strategic decision reflects the platform's commitment to enhancing its monitoring efforts and keeping pace with the evolving crypto landscape.

news.headline: Global Life Reinsurance Market to reach USD 735.6 Billion by 2033, with 12.7% CAGR. Growth driven by mortality trends & longevity risk solutions. Treaty reinsurance dominates market. Mortality solutions and Asia-Pacific digitalization key trends.
news.summary: The research report by Custom Market Insights focuses on the global Life Reinsurance Market, indicating that the market size was around USD 230.9 Billion in 2023 and is projected to reach approximately USD 234.5 Billion in 2024. The report predicts a growth to about USD 735.6 Billion by 2033, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of approximately 12.7% during the forecast period of 2024-2033. The emphasis on mortality trends and longevity risk is highlighted, with reinsurers meeting the need for longevity risk solutions due to aging populations worldwide. The article mentions the importance of advances in predictive modeling, data analytics, and technological specialization for the life reinsurance sector. In addition, it notes that treaty reinsurance and mortality solutions segments held high market shares in 2023 and are expected to maintain dominance during the forecast period. The Asia-Pacific region is mentioned for its growing use of digitalization and technology in underwriting procedures and product innovation to meet changing demands. Berkshire Hathaway Life is highlighted as a risk management firm offering insurance and reinsurance solutions. Key figures include a market size of USD 234.5 Billion in 2024 and USD 735.6 Billion projected for 2033 with a CAGR of 12.7%.
